sizing_rule.note: Optimal f in dollars asymptotically approaches lower bound (worst-case loss at -3 sigmas: -$4,899.56) as upper bound constraint increases. Position size derived from trade distribution model with lower bound as reference anchor.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be adjusted based on the relationship between lower bound (worst-case expected loss) and upper bound of the trade distribution, with optimal f in dollars approaching the lower bound as the upper bound increases.
